title: ericoides hebecalyx
intro: Ericoides hebecalyx, also known as Hebe, is a flowering plant species native to New Zealand and Australia, belonging to the family Plantaginaceae. The medicinal properties of Ericoides hebecalyx include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of this plant include reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system. Ericoides hebecalyx can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and it has been used in herbal medicine for its calming and soothing effects.
